queryName: RBAC Roles with Read Secrets Permissions
expectedValue: metadata.name={{cluster-role-secret-reader}}.rules[0] should not be granted read access to Secrets objects
actualValue: metadata.name={{cluster-role-secret-reader}}.rules[0] is granted read access (verbs: get, watch, list) to Secrets objects

queryName: RBAC Roles with Read Secrets Permissions
expectedValue: metadata.name={{role-secret-reader}}.rules[0] should not be granted read access to Secrets objects
actualValue: metadata.name={{role-secret-reader}}.rules[0] is granted read access (verbs: get, watch, list) to Secrets objects
